Quick View Full Page

Project ONCA

In Progress
2025

A B2B endeavour that that aims to provide an AI-powered call delegation system, so that business owners can focus on building, rather than operating.

  • Python
  • React
  • Bland AI

Overview

ONCA is an AI delegation system, which is fully automated. The purpose of this application is to outsource your calls with customers. If you don’t want to continuously answer calls at the front-desk ONCA is a great solution for you. We will deploy our human-like AI agent to answer, note-down, and book any meetings for you regarding your business, without having any employee-intervention.

The Problem

Businesses tend to close at 5pm. No one is at the frontdesk at 5pm. But our AI agent is always on-call. 24/7.

What I Built

The AI agent is built off of Bland AI, where we integrated their API and focused on tailoring it to businesses. If a business needs to send outbound calls, such as a sales company, we have an agent to do that 24/7. The AI agent, can call, send messages, voicemails, emails, anything to get in contact with the user. Our FastAPI diligently works expeditiously to ensure low latency during calls, so that they sound realisitic and humane to the business’s customers.

Outcome

This project is still in development, as time, budget and human resources are low, however, it is soon to be picked up again. For now, there are no metrics to share.

Full Page

Music Producer DAW

Shipped
2025

Built at Western's Hackathon 2025, this project is a Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) prototype, and I contributed to its design and implementation in TypeScript & Tailwind CSS.

  • TypeScript
  • Tailwind CSS

Overview

My team though of an idea to integrate the fast-growing AI trend into a digital audio workstation, where the AI would help you during the entire process of creating music, suitable for beginners, intermediates and professional artists.

The Idea

We tried to think of a solution to bring in more passionate people who want to create music, but have minimal music theory or notation experience. With our design, we aimed to lower the barrier to music creation.

Why It’s Interesting

Traditional DAWs assume that you have prior experience in the indsutry or that you can already read notation, know theory, etc.

GitHub
Full Page

02 — Experience

Where I've Worked

Currently attending

University of Western Ontario

Bachelor of Engineering Science, Software Engineering

Expected Graduation: June 2027

  1. Ontario Securities Commission

    Information Services Intern

    May 2024 - August 2024

    Toronto, Ontario

    • Engineered a scalable, event-driven messaging system using Java, Spring Boot, and Azure Services (Functions, Service Bus) to automate and streamline data processing workflows.
    • Operated across the full software development lifecycle using a modern tech stack, including Azure DevOps, Postman for API testing, DBeaver for database management, and IDEs like IntelliJ and VS Code.

  2. City of Toronto

    Lifeguard & Swim Instructor

    Jun 2022 — Aug 2023

    Toronto, Ontario

    • Taught swimming lessons to groups of children and adults, tailoring the lessons to the needs of the students.
    • Ensured the safety of the swimmers by enforcing the rules and regulations of the pool.

  3. Legislative Assembly of Ontario

    Legislative Page

    Feb 2019 — March 2019

    Toronto, Ontario

    • Learned the basics of the legislative process, and how to navigate the legislative assembly of Ontario.
    • Helped with the daily operations of the legislative assembly of Ontario by traversing the chambers in order to deliver messages or bills to the appropriate parties.
